teacherReviews.feedback: Clean, complete work. All 4 integration points verified in actual skill files (brain-correct Step 4b, add-rule Step 5b, brain-cycle Phase 7, brain-retro Cognition Sign Scan). The cadence command returns comprehensive health metrics — tested live, correctly reports 35-cycle dormancy. Diagnostic integration has sensible thresholds (15/30 cycles). Smart design decisions: conditional synthesis logging in add-rule prevents inflation, brain-retro catch-all with "don't inflate" guard is well-designed. 8/8 deliverables shipped and verified. Ship it.
